productDisplayName: Tokyo Talkies Women Printed White Top
description: Composition White T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short puff sleeves and grunge look graphic on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash using mild detergent Do not bleach Do not dry in direct sunlight Warm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroidery Custom graphics add to the edgy look of this tokyo talkies T-shirt. The puff sleeves keep the look delicate, while the grunge look graphic with the bright colours give it a bold vibe. Team it with jeans, carpis or shorts.
